name: Spicy Spritz Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: 365 Great Cookies You Can Make
Preparation Time: 0:35
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a baking sheet with cooking spray.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine margarine, egg white, and vanilla.
4. In another mixing bowl, combine flour, cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg, allspice, and salt.
5. Mix wet ingredients with dry ingredients just until moistened.
6. Spoon dough into a cookie press fitted with the template of desired shape.
7. Press cookies 2 inches apart onto prepared cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 10 minutes, or until golden brown.
